fullArticle:
The US CPI report for June will be the key risk event on the economic calendar for next week. And alongside US-Iran developments, it should keep markets a little busy once again. But after a struggling June, US stocks will have a lot to look forward to in the weeks ahead as earnings season is just around the corner.

As per usual, we will see financials kick things off with the early reporting next week. And then that will be followed by key names in big tech especially. With investors demanding nothing short of perfection and exceptional, it is going to be a major test for semiconductors, chipmakers, and hyperscalers all to deliver.

It's crunch time for Wall Street. Here are some of the big names for next week:
